title: pleopeltis elongata
intro: Pleopeltis elongata, also known as the elongated polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pleopeltis elongata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
